title: corneria pierrei
intro: Corneria pierrei is a plant species, also known as the 'Gamboge plant', that belongs to the family Guttiferae. It is commonly used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its resinous sap, which contains the pigment gamboge, a natural yellow dye. The medicinal properties of Corneria pierrei include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help in treating various health conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of the plant can be obtained through herbal preparations such as tea, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
